title: Summary: Turn 27
content: File `pepe-worker-process.ts` defines `processPepeSessionSnapshot(snapshot, semanticClient, embeddingClient, config) → Promise<PepeWorkerProcessResult>`. It checks `shouldSummarizeMemory` helper, summarizes qualifying memories via semantic client, prepares embedding batch (user input + summarized memory), and ranks candidates with `rankMemoryCandidatesWithVectors` using summary overrides. Returns session details, summaries, candidates, timestamps.
